## Select PR type

> Click one of the links below, then switch to the **Preview** tab to load the template.

### Option 1: Create new PR with template
- 🚀 [Feature](/pull/new/main?template=feature_template.md)
- 🐛 [Fix](/pull/new/main?template=fix_template.md)
- ♻️ [Refactor](/pull/new/main?template=refactor_template.md)

### Option 2: Or use the fallback (if needed)
- 🚀 [Feature](../../compare/main...HEAD?template=feature_template.md)
- 🐛 [Fix](../../compare/main...HEAD?template=fix_template.md)
- ♻️ [Refactor](../../compare/main...HEAD?template=refactor_template.md)
